movies.title: Baahubali: The Beginning
movies.description: Shivudu discovers his royal heritage and begins an epic journey to reclaim Mahishmati.

movies.title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
movies.description: The mystery behind Amarendra Baahubali's death is revealed in this grand conclusion.

movies.title: RRR
movies.description: Two legendary revolutionaries unite against British rule in a fictional historical drama.

movies.title: Pushpa: The Rise
movies.description: Pushpa Raj rises through the ranks of the red sandalwood smuggling syndicate.

movies.title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
movies.description: Pushpa returns stronger than ever to dominate his enemies and expand his empire.

movies.title: Salaar
movies.description: A fierce friendship turns into a powerful battle for control of a kingdom.

movies.title: Kalki 2898 AD
movies.description: A futuristic mythological epic set in a dystopian world inspired by the Mahabharata.

movies.title: Devara
movies.description: A coastal warrior fights injustice and protects his people from powerful enemies.

movies.title: Hanu-Man
movies.description: A young man gains divine powers inspired by Lord Hanuman and battles evil forces.

movies.title: Sita Ramam
movies.description: A timeless love story between an army officer and a mysterious woman unfolds through letters.
